persona.name: Emma Taylor
persona.motivations_goals: Maintain her social status while excelling in sports and academics
persona.backstory: Has been one of the popular kids since elementary school, works hard to maintain her image

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Front desk where visitors check in

pending_events.description: I was just shot and injured

actions.plan: I should catch up with Lucas and see what's new with him. It's always good to stay connected with friends.

actions.dialog_text: Lucas, stay close to me. We need to be ready to act if the shooter comes near us.
actions.plan: There's an active shooter in the building. I need to protect myself and others. I can't just hide—I have to confront the shooter if necessary.

actions.dialog_text: You’re not going to hurt anyone else!
actions.plan: I’ve been shot, but I can’t let the shooter hurt anyone else. I need to confront them and stop this, even if it’s the last thing I do.

memories.description: I saw Lucas in the cafeteria and decided to catch up with him to maintain our friendship.
I heard a gunshot and realized there's an active shooter. I decided to stay with Lucas and prepare to confront the shooter if needed.
I was shot but decided to confront the shooter to protect others, even if it means risking my life.
